leadText: Moomoo Milk (Japanese: モーモーミルク Moomoo Milk) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation II. It is a drink that restores a Pokémon's HP.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 100 HP . It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Moomoo Milk can be used as an ingredient in cooking , with a base Strength of 98. It can be used to cook the following recipes: Name Recipe Minimum pot size " Dream Eater " Butter Curry Soft Potato ×18 Snoozy Tomato ×15 Soothing Cacao ×12 Moomoo Milk ×10 55 Hearty Cheeseburger Curry Bean Sausage ×8 Moomoo Milk ×8 16 Soft Potato Chowder Moomoo Milk ×10 Soft Potato ×8 Tasty Mushroom ×4 22 Simple Chowder Moomoo Milk ×7 7 " Limber " Corn Stew Greengrass Corn ×14 Moomoo Milk ×8 Soft Potato ×8 30 " Snow Cloak " Caesar Salad Moomoo Milk ×10 Bean Sausage ×6 16 Moomoo Caprese Salad Moomoo Milk ×12 Snoozy Tomato ×6 Pure Oil ×5 23 " Dazzling " Apple Cheese Salad Fancy Apple ×15 Moomoo Milk ×5 Pure Oil ×3 23 " Fluffy " Sweet Potatoes Soft Potato ×9 Moomoo Milk ×5 14 Jigglypuff 's Fruity Flan Honey ×20 Fancy Egg ×15 Fancy Apple ×10 Moomoo Milk ×10 55 " Lovely Kiss " Smoothie Fancy Apple ×11 Moomoo Milk ×9 Honey ×7 Soothing Cacao ×8 35 " Lucky Chant " Apple Pie Fancy Apple ×12 Moomoo Milk ×4 16 " Sweet Scent " Chocolate Cake Honey ×9 Soothing Cacao ×8 Moomoo Milk ×7 24 Warm Moomoo Milk Moomoo Milk ×7 7 Big Malasada Pure Oil ×10 Moomoo Milk ×7 Honey ×6 23 " Explosion " Popcorn Greengrass Corn ×15 Pure Oil ×14 Moomoo Milk ×7 36 " Teatime " Corn Scones Fancy Apple ×20 Warming Ginger ×20 Greengrass Corn ×18 Moomoo Milk ×9 67 " Flower Gift " Macarons Soothing Cacao ×25 Fancy Egg ×25 Honey ×17 Moomoo Milk ×10 77 " Mold Breaker " Corn Tiramisu Rousing Coffee ×14 Greengrass Corn ×14 Moomoo Milk ×12 40 Clodsire Éclair Soothing Cacao ×30 Moomoo Milk ×26 Rousing Coffee ×24 Honey ×22 102

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Moomoo Milk can be gathered by the player's helper Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Restores Pok é mon HP by 100. R S E Colo XD A nutritious milk that restores HP by 100 points. FR LG Highly nutritious milk. It restores the HP of one Pok é mon by 100 points. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 Milk with a very high nutrition content. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 100 points. X Y OR AS A bottle of highly nutritious milk. When consumed, it restores 100 HP to an injured Pokémon. S M US UM P E A bottle of highly nutritious milk. When consumed, it restores up to 100 HP to an injured Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA A bottle of highly nutritious milk. It can be used to restore 100 HP to a single Pokémon. S V ZA A bottle of highly nutritious milk. It can be used to restore 100 HP to a Pokémon.
